- Reserve an additional 40% capacity for peak windows (Nov–Feb burst)
- Clarify credits/termination terms if SLAs aren't met

Attached: current_usage_report.csv

Can we get a ballpark on pricing and possible term trade-offs? Kyle (cc) will own procurement.

NimbusAI has approached our SREs with a performance benchmark offer — they claim sub-120ms 99th on our gpt-4-style workload at 8k context. That's catching attention because we are planning to expand from 4 GPUs to ~12 GPUs to support a new personalization pilot.

Before we go too far with them, procurement asked if Redwood can:
- Run an impartial 48-hour benchmark using our sample traces (attached RFP),
- Provide a commercial alternative if results are comparable (pricing/commitments),
- Confirm whether you can guarantee latency SLO ...
